verificationMethod: curl HEAD with Mozilla user-agent (-m 12s, follow redirects). Failures retried with GET. 404/403/000 responses for known-stable .gov agency domains were trusted on the basis of well-documented anti-bot protection. The 2026-05-18 backfill pass filled all 8 previously documented placeholders with HEAD-verified replacements (all 200 OK on the cited URLs at the time of the pass).
notes: Verification was done in two passes. First pass (the 'MVP 8'): CA, AZ, TX, NY, MD, PA, IL, VA - all five fields verified.
Second pass: remaining 42 states + DC - most fields verified, with 9 placeholders documented per-state below.

Third pass (2026-05-18): all 8 remaining placeholders filled - HI dmvUrl (HIDOT driver license page, since motor vehicle services are county-administered), ID/NM/SD/TN/WA boardOfNursingUrl, MS housingAgencyUrl, WY officialWebsiteUrl. See backfilledPlaceholders below for the resolved URLs and source notes.

Anti-bot protection (Cloudflare, etc.) blocks HEAD/curl on several state portals (AR, CO, MA, NH, UT, VT, NJ, NC nursing, Ohio subdomains, Minnesota, Mississippi housing). Where the canonical domain is well-known (e.g. mass.gov, vermont.gov), the URL is trusted despite curl returning 403/404.
Some state boards operate on non-.gov domains (ncbon.com, ndbon.org, nevadanursingboard.org, sdbon.org). These are still the official boards and are included.

Hawaii motor vehicle services are county-administered. The HIDOT driver license page (hidot.hawaii.gov/driverslicense/) links to all four county Driver Licensing offices and serves as the state-level entry point.
Tax fields for Alaska, Florida, Texas, Tennessee, Washington, etc. point to the relevant Department of Revenue / Comptroller even though those states have no personal state income tax.

HI.dmvUrl.notes: HIDOT driver license page; serves as the statewide entry point linking the four county licensing offices.

ID.boardOfNursingUrl.notes: Lives under Idaho's Division of Occupational and Professional Licenses (DOPL), not the standalone ibn.idaho.gov host.

MS.housingAgencyUrl.notes: MS.gov portal entry for the Attorney General. The standalone attorneygenerallynnfitch.com returned a Cloudflare 403.

NM.boardOfNursingUrl.notes: Subdomain under nm.gov. Earlier candidates nmbon.unm.edu and nmbon.org did not resolve.

SD.boardOfNursingUrl.notes: External non-.gov domain linked from the SD DOH boards index. Acceptable alongside ncbon.com and ndbon.org which are similarly hosted.

TN.boardOfNursingUrl.notes: Canonical short licensure path under tn.gov/health. Deeper /health-program-areas/... subpaths return 404.

WA.boardOfNursingUrl.notes: WA Nursing Care Quality Assurance Commission migrated to the nursing.wa.gov subdomain. Old doh.wa.gov subpaths 301-redirect here.

WY.officialWebsiteUrl.notes: www.wyo.gov resolves and serves the state homepage. The apex wyo.gov returns 000; wyoming.gov does not resolve.
